reason: Frontend architecture and required checks for implementing shared copy/component/domain helpers.
Where copy, domain helpers, components, routes, and tests belong.
Reusable presentational component conventions and accessibility expectations.
Ensure support-boundary copy remains route-local and does not persist or create impacts.
Safety copy must avoid diagnostic/verdict behavior and preserve local-first constraints.
Use typed unions and pure helpers without any/unsafe browser assumptions.
Main PRD safety acceptance and P1/P2 status matrix define this backlog item.
